title: Floral
description: Adds many new flowers to the game and makes dye easier to get, and even more
body:
A mod made by Me (McAceJr), and with help from CrazyBenji.

Thanks to CrazyBenji for cleaning up some of my code, and for the forge port of my mod!

This mod mainly just adds more flowers so dyes wouldnt be so difficult to get, but I ended up adding a little bit more than just flowers in the end. There are many flowers some of which grant items when harvested. Some flowers are even weapons in disguise.

# Main Features:
## Tulips of every color:
![Tulips of all the dye colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80e1836ec44a38e494a50c841424d7c9893feedd_0.webp)
## A bunch of new flowers:
![A bunch of colorful new flowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19efc04efe82c7c0871dc81a65094f1151b48d33_0.webp)
## Harvestable Type Flowers:
![Special flowers that grow and can be harvested](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/474d5cde7465533b65ca0f7e5f671b9657872c95_0.webp)
## Petals for every color:
![Petals of every dye color](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24948030c04f55aa9bbadcc85b5d9afa1ba2b005_0.webp)
Petals are made from flowers and a flower trimmer. (all modded flowers will probably not work as custom tags were used) Petals main use is to get more dye per flower.

## New Wood Type and Stone Type:

### Stem Wood:
![Green wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4c15d26da47031466a2e2534cfab81754de7a0d_0.webp)
### Floral Stone:
![flower covered stones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85b138f3ee8bd12e7b9c2aff69310780da572378_0.webp)
## New tools and weapons:
### Flower Trimmer:
![A set of flower trimmers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cb13861763fb94ad56db7c9f6f87fca8f7a8721.png)
A tool that acts like a sword but can be used to trim the petals off of flowers

### Dead Header:
![A large pair of flower trimmers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aefbb833354b6f19a2da75e8265f89ed0489922a.png)
An upgrade to the flower timmer allowing much better pvp options with the weapon while also still being able to trim flowers.

### Corpse Blossom:
![A flower with its roots in the shape of a sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/446ea41883c139cf165769c7a53733090d704441.png)
A plant in the shape of a sword with 3 custom enchantments,

1. lvl 1-3 Poison Ivy - Adds poison to target, enchantment lvl corresponds to the effects lvl
2. lvl 1-5 Hungry Fauna - Adds hunger to target, enchantment lvl corresponds to the effects lvl
3. Withering Roots - Adds wither to the target, always wither lvl 1

### Floral Bane:
![A poisoned sickle like sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be86fd8ca4765b74d154e39a29bc2011b6a1caf4.png)
A very deadly blade that inflicts a new effect death prick. Death prick will slowly deal damage to any mob applied with the effect the effect is fatal, and the Floral bane applies it for a very long time so it is suggested to drink milk to cure yourself.

New Bone Meal For Flowers:
![A flower filled bonemeal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/919d148e5bf69c367d0327043b537dd8d132d94f.png)
Small flowers aren't able to be bonemealed so this new item can now create more smaller flowers. (uses a minecraft tag so other modded flowers could work with this)
